title: Sprint Board
description: Content for one sprint review screen. Only what changes each sprint.

sprint.description: Sprint number. Also encoded in the filename (sprint-47.yaml).

dates.description: Human-authored date range, verbatim as shown on screen. e.g. 'Jun 23 – Jul 4, 2026'. Deliberately a literal string, not computed start/end fields.

agenda.description: Ordered agenda beats. Rendered as a numbered list.

topic.description: What's being demoed. The bold line.

who.description: Presenter name. The quiet grey line under the topic.

demos.description: Dev Demos grid. Order is presentation order.
